These dependencies need to be updated together.\n\nUpdates `minimatch` from 9.0.5 to 10.2.5\n<details>\n<summary>Changelog</summary>\n<p><em>Sourced from <a href=\"https://github.com/isaacs/minimatch/blob/main/changelog.md\">minimatch's changelog</a>.</em></p>\n<blockquote>\n<h1>change log</h1>\n<h2>10.2</h2>\n<ul>\n<li>Add <code>braceExpandMax</code> option</li>\n</ul>\n<h2>10.1</h2>\n<ul>\n<li>Add <code>magicalBraces</code> option for <code>escape</code></li>\n<li>Fix <code>makeRe</code> when <code>partial: true</code> is set.</li>\n<li>Fix <code>makeRe</code> when pattern ends in a final <code>**</code> path part.</li>\n</ul>\n<h2>10.0</h2>\n<ul>\n<li>Require node 20 or 22 and higher</li>\n</ul>\n<h2>9.0</h2>\n<ul>\n<li>No default export, only named exports.</li>\n</ul>\n<h2>8.0</h2>\n<ul>\n<li>Recursive descent parser for extglob, allowing correct support\nfor arbitrarily nested extglob expressions</li>\n<li>Bump required Node.js version</li>\n</ul>\n<h2>7.4</h2>\n<ul>\n<li>Add <code>escape()</code> method</li>\n<li>Add <code>unescape()</code> method</li>\n<li>Add <code>Minimatch.hasMagic()</code> method</li>\n</ul>\n<h2>7.3</h2>\n<ul>\n<li>Add support for posix character classes in a unicode-aware way.</li>\n</ul>\n<h2>7.2</h2>\n<ul>\n<li>Add <code>windowsNoMagicRoot</code> option</li>\n</ul>\n<h2>7.1</h2>\n<ul>\n<li>Add <code>optimizationLevel</code> configuration option, and revert the\ndefault back to the 6.2 style minimal optimizations, making the\nadvanced transforms introduced in 7.0 opt-in. Also, process\nprovided file paths in the same way in optimizationLevel:2\nmode, so <em>most</em> things that matched with optimizationLevel 1 or\n0 <em>should</em> match with level 2 as well. However, level 1 is the\ndefault, out of an abundance of caution.</li>\n</ul>\n<!-- raw HTML omitted -->\n</blockquote>\n<p>... you?\\n\\n\"\n+    \"Sami\\n\"\n+    \"Dealix — https://dealix.me\\n\"\n+    \"Proposal: {presentation_link}\\n\"\n+    \"Book a call: https://calendly.com/sami-assiri11/dealix-demo\\n\\n\"\n+    \"[DRAFT_ONLY — requires approval before sending]\"\n+)\n+\n+PRESENTATION_LINK = \"https://dealix.me/proposal\"\n+\n+\n+# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n+# Optional YAML loader\n+# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n+\n+\n+def _load_yaml_templates(path: Path) -> dict[str, Any] | None:\n+    \"\"\"Load outreach templates from YAML. Returns None if unavailable.\"\"\"\n+    if not _YAML_AVAILABLE:\n+        return None\n+    if not path.exists():\n+        return None\n+    try:\n+        with path.open(encoding=\"utf-8\") as fh:\n+            return _yaml.safe_load(fh)\n+    except Exception:\n+        return None\n+\n+\n+# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n+# CSV target loader\n+# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n+\n+\n+def load_targets(csv_path: Path) -> list[dict[str, str]]:\n+    \"\"\"\n+    Load companies from a CSV file.\n+\n+    Expected columns (any extras are ignored):\n+        company, sector, city, email, contact_name\n+\n+    Returns a list of dicts — empty list if file is absent.\n+    \"\"\"\n+    if not csv_path.exists():\n+        return []\n+    rows: list[dict[str, str]] = []\n+    with csv_path.open(encoding=\"utf-8-sig\", newline=\"\") as fh:\n+        reader = csv.DictReader(fh)\n+        for row in reader:\n+            rows.append({k.strip().lower(): (v or \"\").strip() for k, v in row.items()})\n+    return rows\n+\n+\n+# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n+# Draft rendering\n+# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n+\n+\n+def _angle_ar(sector: str, yaml_data: dict[str, Any] | None) -> str:\n+    if yaml_data:\n+        try:\n+            tmpl = yaml_data.get(\"email\", {}).get(\"body_ar\", \"\")\n+            if tmpl and \"{angle}\" not in tmpl:\n+                # yaml provides a full body — extract angle-like content\n+                pass\n+        except Exception:\n+            pass\n+    return ANGLES_AR.get(sector, ANGLES_AR[\"b2b_services\"])\n+\n+\n+def _angle_en(sector: str, yaml_data: dict[str, Any] | None) -> str:\n+    return ANGLES_EN.get(sector, ANGLES_EN[\"b2b_services\"])\n+\n+\n+def render_draft(\n+    company: dict[str, str],\n+    language: str,\n+    yaml_data: dict[str, Any] | None,\n+    draft_index: int,\n+) -> dict[str, Any]:\n+    \"\"\"\n+    Render a single draft for one company in one language.\n+\n+    Returns a flat dict suitable for CSV row + gmail_queue entry.\n+    \"\"\"\n+    sector = company.get(\"sector\", \"b2b_services\").strip() or \"b2b_services\"\n+    company_name = company.get(\"company\", company.get(\"company_name\", \"الشركة\")).strip() or \"الشركة\"\n+    city = company.get(\"city\", \"\").strip()\n+    contact_name = company.get(\"contact_name\", \"\").strip()\n+    email_addr = company.get(\"email\", \"\").strip()\n+\n+    now_iso = datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(timespec=\"seconds\")\n+\n+    if language == \"ar\":\n+        subject = SUBJECT_AR_TEMPLATE.format(company=company_name)\n+        angle = _angle_ar(sector, yaml_data)\n+        body = BODY_AR_TEMPLATE.format(\n+            company=company_name,\n+            angle=angle,\n+            presentation_link=PRESENTATION_LINK,\n+        )\n+    else:\n+        subject = SUBJECT_EN_TEMPLATE.format(company=company_name)\n+        angle = _angle_en(sector, yaml_data)\n+        body = BODY_EN_TEMPLATE.format(\n+            company=company_name,\n+            angle=angle,\n+            presentation_link=PRESENTATION_LINK,\n+        )\n+\n+    draft_id = f\"draft_{draft_index:04d}\"\n+\n+    return {\n+        \"id\": draft_id,\n+        \"company\": company_name,\n+        \"sector\": sector,\n+        \"city\": city,\n+        \"contact_name\": contact_name,\n+        \"email\": email_addr,\n+        \"language\": language,\n+        \"subject\": subject,\n+        \"body\": body,\n+        \"channel\": \"email\",\n+        \"status\": \"draft_only\",\n+        \"approval_required\": True,\n+        \"created_at\": now_iso,\n+    }\n+\n+\n+# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n+# Synthetic target generation (fallback when CSV is absent or small)\n+# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n+\n+\n+def _synthetic_targets(sectors: list[str], count: int) -> list[dict[str, str]]:\n+    \"\"\"\n+    Produce synthetic target rows so the script always generates >= count drafts\n+    even without a real CSV file.\n+    \"\"\"\n+    cities = [\"الرياض\", \"جدة\", \"الدمام\", \"مكة المكرمة\", \"المدينة المنورة\", \"الخبر\", \"أبها\"]\n+    rows: list[dict[str, str]] = []\n+    per_sector = max(1, (count // len(sectors)) + 1)\n+    idx = 0\n+    for sector in sectors:\n+        label = SECTOR_LABELS_AR.get(sector, sector)\n+        for i in range(per_sector):\n+            idx += 1\n+            rows.append(\n+                {\n+                    \"company\": f\"شركة {label} {idx}\",\n+                    \"sector\": sector,\n+                    \"city\": cities[idx % len(cities)],\n+                    \"email\": \"\",\n+                    \"contact_name\": \"\",\n+                }\n+            )\n+    return rows\n+\n+\n+# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n+# Core generation logic\n+# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n+\n+\n+def generate_drafts(\n+    sectors: list[str],\n+    count: int,\n+    target_date: str,\n+    targets_path: Path,\n+    lang: str,\n+    yaml_data: dict[str, Any] | None,\n+) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:\n+    \"\"\"\n+    Generate at least `count` draft records across the requested sectors and languages.\n+\n+    Returns a flat list of draft dicts.\n+    \"\"\"\n+    raw_targets = load_targets(targets_path)\n+\n+    # Filter to requested sectors\n+    if raw_targets:\n+        filtered = [r for r in raw_targets if r.get(\"sector\", \"\") in sectors]\n+        if not filtered:\n+            filtered = raw_targets  # fallback: use all if no sector match\n+    else:\n+        filtered = []\n+\n+    # Determine how many languages we need\n+    languages: list[str]\n+    if lang == \"ar\":\n+        languages = [\"ar\"]\n+    elif lang == \"en\":\n+        languages = [\"en\"]\n+    else:\n+        languages = [\"ar\", \"en\"]\n+\n+    # We need enough target rows to reach `count` total drafts across all languages.\n+    target_rows_needed = max(1, (count + len(languages) - 1) // len(languages))\n+\n+    # Interleave sectors so coverage is spread evenly across all 12 sectors\n+    from collections import defaultdict\n+    import random\n+    by_sector: dict[str, list[dict[str, str]]] = defaultdict(list)\n+    for row in filtered:\n+        by_sector[row.get(\"sector\", \"unknown\")].append(row)\n+\n+    interleaved: list[dict[str, str]] = []\n+    sector_lists = list(by_sector.values())\n+    max_len = max((len(s) for s in sector_lists), default=0)\n+    for i in range(max_len):\n+        for sl in sector_lists:\n+            if i < len(sl):\n+                interleaved.append(sl[i])\n+\n+    # Pad with synthetic rows if real data is short\n+    if len(interleaved) < target_rows_needed:\n+        synthetic = _synthetic_targets(sectors, target_rows_needed - len(interleaved))\n+        interleaved = interleaved + synthetic\n+\n+    # Trim / cycle to exact need\n+    combined: list[dict[str, str]] = []\n+    while len(combined) < target_rows_needed:\n+        combined.extend(interleaved)\n+    combined = combined[:target_rows_needed]\n+\n+    drafts: list[dict[str, Any]] = []\n+    idx = 1\n+    for company in combined:\n+        for language in languages:\n+            if len(drafts) >= count:\n+                break\n+            draft = render_draft(company, language, yaml_data, idx)\n+            drafts.append(draft)\n+            idx += 1\n+        if len(drafts) >= count:\n+            break\n+\n+    return drafts\n+\n+\n+# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n+# Output writers\n+# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n+\n+\n+def write_markdown_drafts(\n+    drafts: list[dict[str, Any]],\n+    language: str,\n+    out_path: Path,\n+) -> None:\n+    \"\"\"Write drafts for one language to a numbered markdown file.\"\"\"\n+    lang_drafts = [d for d in drafts if d[\"language\"] == language]\n+    lines: list[str] = [\n+        f\"# مسودات يومية — {language.upper()}\\n\",\n+        f\"**المجموع:** {len(lang_drafts)}\\n\\n---\\n\",\n+    ]\n+    for i, d in enumerate(lang_drafts, start=1):\n+        lines.append(f\"## [{i}] {d['company']} — {d['sector']}\")\n+        lines.append(f\"**ID:** {d['id']}  \")\n+        lines.append(f\"**Subject:** {d['subject']}  \")\n+        lines.append(f\"**Status:** {d['status']} | approval_required: {d['approval_required']}\")\n+        lines.append(\"\")\n+        lines.append(d[\"body\"])\n+        lines.append(\"\\n---\\n\")\n+    out_path.write_text(\"\\n\".join(lines), encoding=\"utf-8\")\n+\n+\n+def write_csv_drafts(drafts: list[dict[str, Any]], out_path: Path) -> None:\n+    \"\"\"Write all drafts to a CSV file.\"\"\"\n+    fieldnames = [\"id\", \"company\", \"sector\", \"city\", \"language\", \"subject\", \"body\", \"channel\", \"status\"]\n+    with out_path.open(\"w\", encoding=\"utf-8-sig\", newline=\"\") as fh:\n+        writer = csv.DictWriter(fh, fieldnames=fieldnames, extrasaction=\"ignore\")\n+        writer.writeheader()\n+        for d in drafts:\n+            writer.writerow(d)\n+\n+\n+def write_gmail_queue(drafts: list[dict[str, Any]], out_path: Path, limit: int) -> None:\n+    \"\"\"Write the Gmail-ready queue JSON (capped at limit entries).\"\"\"\n+    queue = []\n+    for d in drafts[:limit]:\n+        queue.append(\n+            {\n+                \"id\": d[\"id\"],\n+                \"company\": d[\"company\"],\n+                \"sector\": d[\"sector\"],\n+                \"language\": d[\"language\"],\n+                \"subject\": d[\"subject\"],\n+                \"body\": d[\"body\"],\n+                \"status\": \"draft_only\",\n+                \"approval_required\": True,\n+                \"created_at\": d[\"created_at\"],\n+            }\n+        )\n+    out_path.write_text(json.dumps(queue, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding=\"utf-8\")\n+\n+\n+def write_summary(\n+    drafts: list[dict[str, Any]],\n+    target_date: str,\n+    out_path: Path,\n+) -> None:\n+    \"\"\"Write a human-readable daily summary in Arabic.\"\"\"\n+    ar_count = sum(1 for d in drafts if d[\"language\"] == \"ar\")\n+    en_count = sum(1 for d in drafts if d[\"language\"] == \"en\")\n+    companies = len({d[\"company\"] for d in drafts})\n+    sector_counts: dict[str, int] = {}\n+    for d in drafts:\n+        sector_counts[d[\"sector\"]] = sector_counts.get(d[\"sector\"], 0) + 1\n+\n+    sector_table_rows = \"\\n\".join(\n+        f\"| {SECTOR_LABELS_AR.get(s, s)} | {c} |\"\n+        for s, c in sorted(sector_counts.items(), key=lambda x: -x[1])\n+    )\n+\n+    summary = f\"\"\"# تقرير المسودات اليومية — {target_date}\n+\n+## الملخص\n+- إجمالي المسودات: {len(drafts)}\n+- مسودات عربية: {ar_count}\n+- مسودات إنجليزية: {en_count}\n+- القطاعات: {len(sector_counts)}\n+- الشركات المستهدفة: {companies}\n+\n+## توزيع القطاعات\n+| القطاع | عدد المسودات |\n+|--------|-------------|\n+{sector_table_rows}\n+\n+## القاعدة الذهبية\n+[DRAFT_ONLY] جميع المسودات للمراجعة فقط — لا إرسال تلقائي.\n+يجب الحصول على موافقة صريحة قبل إرسال أي مسودة.\n+\"\"\"\n+    out_path.write_text(summary, encoding=\"utf-8\")\n+\n+\n+# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n+# Optional Gmail push\n+# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n+\n+\n+def push_gmail_drafts(queue: list[dict[str, Any]], limit: int) -> int:\n+    \"\"\"\n+    Create Gmail drafts using the Gmail API (drafts.create — never messages.send).\n+\n+    Returns the number of drafts successfully created. Gracefully skips if\n+    credentials are not configured.\n+    \"\"\"\n+    try:\n+        from google.oauth2.credentials import Credentials  # type: ignore\n+        from googleapiclient.discovery import build  # type: ignore\n+    except ImportError:\n+        print(\"  [gmail-push] google-api-python-client not installed — skipping.\")\n+        return 0\n+\n+    creds_path = Path(os.getenv(\"GMAIL_CREDENTIALS_PATH\", str(REPO_ROOT / \"credentials.json\")))",

.\reports\github-context\pr-701\review_comments.json:7:    "diff_hunk": "@@ -0,0 +1,272 @@\n+\"\"\"Transformation OS Proposal Generator — bilingual (AR+EN), governed, stateless.\n+\n+Builds an enterprise transformation proposal from the canonical service catalog\n+(`auto_client_acquisition.service_catalog`). It NEVER hardcodes prices (Article 11\n++ no_invented_crm_kpi) — every figure is read from the registry and stamped as an\n+estimate (Article 8). Output defaults to `approval_status=\"approval_required\"` and\n+is never auto-sent (NO_LIVE_SEND). Guaranteed-outcome language in the request is\n+rejected (doctrine: no_guaranteed_sales_claims).\n+\n+Input:  TransformationProposalRequest (company, sector, selected_system_ids, …)\n+Output: TransformationProposal (line items from catalog + bilingual markdown)\n+Gate:   approval_required — founder reviews before anything reaches a customer.\n+\"\"\"\n+\n+from __future__ import annotations\n+\n+import hashlib\n+import json\n+import logging\n+from datetime import UTC, datetime\n+from typing import Any\n+\n+from pydantic import BaseModel, ConfigDict, Field\n+\n+from auto_client_acquisition.service_catalog import get_offering\n+\n+log = logging.getLogger(__name__)\n+\n+# Tokens that would turn a proposal into a forbidden guarantee (doctrine).\n+_FORBIDDEN_AR = (\"نضمن\", \"ضمان مؤكد\", \"مضمون\")\n+_FORBIDDEN_EN = (\"guarantee\", \"guaranteed\")\n+\n+_DISCLAIMER_AR = \"القيمة التقديرية ليست قيمة مُتحقَّقة — Estimated value is not Verified value.\"\n+_APPROVAL_NOTE_AR = \"هذا العرض للمراجعة فقط — لن يُرسَل لأي عميل دون موافقة المؤسس.\"\n+_APPROVAL_NOTE_EN = \"This proposal is for review only — will not be sent without founder approval.\"\n+\n+\n+class TransformationProposalError(ValueError):\n+    \"\"\"Raised on doctrine violation or empty/invalid selection. Routers map → 400.\"\"\"\n+\n+\n+class TransformationProposalRequest(BaseModel):\n+    model_config = ConfigDict(extra=\"forbid\")\n+\n+    company_name: str = Field(..., min_length=1)\n+    sector: str = \"b2b_services\"\n+    selected_system_ids: list[str] = Field(default_factory=list)\n+    stakeholders: list[str] = Field(default_factory=list)  # e.g. CEO, CFO, CTO, COO\n+    pain_points: list[str] = Field(default_factory=list)\n+    notes: str = \"\"\n+\n+\n+class ProposalLineItem(BaseModel):\n+    system_id: str\n+    name_ar: str\n+    name_en: str\n+    price_unit: str\n+    setup_sar_min: float\n+    setup_sar_max: float | None = None\n+    monthly_sar_min: float | None = None\n+    monthly_sar_max: float | None = None\n+    deliverables: list[str] = Field(default_factory=list)\n+    is_estimate: bool = True\n+\n+\n+class TransformationProposal(BaseModel):\n+    proposal_id: str\n+    company_name: str\n+    sector: str\n+    generated_at: datetime = Field(default_factory=lambda: datetime.now(UTC))\n+    stakeholders: list[str] = Field(default_factory=list)\n+    line_items: list[ProposalLineItem]\n+    unknown_system_ids: list[str] = Field(default_factory=list)\n+    total_setup_sar_min: float = 0.0\n+    total_setup_sar_max: float = 0.0\n+    total_monthly_sar_min: float = 0.0\n+    total_monthly_sar_max: float = 0.0\n+    markdown_ar_en: str = \"\"\n+    is_estimate: bool = True\n+    approval_status: str = \"approval_required\"\n+    governance_decision: str = \"pending\"  # pending | approved | rejected\n+\n+    def to_dict(self) -> dict[str, Any]:\n+        return json.loads(self.model_dump_json())\n+\n+\n+class TransformationProposalGenerator:\n+    \"\"\"Assembles a bilingual transformation proposal from catalog offerings.\"\"\"\n+\n+    def generate(self, req: TransformationProposalRequest) -> TransformationProposal:\n+        self._guard_no_guarantee(req)\n+\n+        if not req.selected_system_ids:\n+            raise TransformationProposalError(\n+                \"selected_system_ids is empty — اختر نظامًا واحدًا على الأقل من الكتالوج.\"\n+            )\n+\n+        line_items: list[ProposalLineItem] = []\n+        unknown: list[str] = []\n+        for sid in req.selected_system_ids:\n+            offering = get_offering(sid)\n+            # Only enterprise transformation systems are valid here.\n+            if offering is None or offering.customer_journey_stage != \"transformation\":\n+                unknown.append(sid)\n+                continue\n+            line_items.append(\n+                ProposalLineItem(\n+                    system_id=offering.id,\n+                    name_ar=offering.name_ar,\n+                    name_en=offering.name_en,\n+                    price_unit=offering.price_unit,\n+                    setup_sar_min=offering.price_sar,\n+                    setup_sar_max=offering.price_sar_max,\n+                    monthly_sar_min=offering.price_monthly_sar_min,\n+                    monthly_sar_max=offering.price_monthly_sar_max,\n+                    deliverables=list(offering.deliverables),\n+                )\n+            )\n+\n+        if not line_items:\n+            raise TransformationProposalError(\n+                \"No valid transformation systems selected — \"\n+                f\"unknown ids: {', '.join(unknown) or '(none)'}\"\n+            )\n+\n+        totals = self._totals(line_items)\n+        proposal_id = self._proposal_id(req)\n+        proposal = TransformationProposal(\n+            proposal_id=proposal_id,\n+            company_name=req.company_name,\n+            sector=req.sector,\n+            stakeholders=list(req.stakeholders),\n+            line_items=line_items,\n+            unknown_system_ids=unknown,\n+            **totals,\n+        )\n+        proposal.markdown_ar_en = self._render_markdown(req, proposal)\n+        log.info(\n+            \"transformation_proposal_generated proposal_id=%s company=%s systems=%d\",\n+            proposal_id,\n+            req.company_name,",

float | None, high: float | None) -> str:\n+        if not low and not high:\n+            return \"Custom / مخصص\"\n+        lo = f\"{int(low):,}\" if low else \"0\"\n+        if high is None or high == low:\n+            return f\"{lo} SAR\"\n+        return f\"{lo}–{int(high):,} SAR\"\n+\n+    def _render_markdown(\n+        self, req: TransformationProposalRequest, p: TransformationProposal\n+ name_en=offering.name_en,\n+                    price_unit=offering.price_unit,\n+                    setup_sar_min=offering.price_sar,\n+                    setup_sar_max=offering.price_sar_max,\n+                    monthly_sar_min=offering.price_monthly_sar_min,\n+                    monthly_sar_max=offering.price_monthly_sar_max,\n+                    deliverables=list(offering.deliverables),\n+                )\n+            )\n+\n+        if not line_items:\n+            raise TransformationProposalError(\n+                \"No valid transformation systems selected — \"\n+                f\"unknown ids: {', '.join(unknown) or '(none)'}\"\n+            )\n+\n+        totals = self._totals(line_items)\n+        proposal_id = self._proposal_id(req)\n+        proposal = TransformationProposal(\n+            proposal_id=proposal_id,\n+            company_name=req.company_name,\n+            sector=req.sector,\n+            stakeholders=list(req.stakeholders),\n+            line_items=line_items,\n+            unknown_system_ids=unknown,\n+            **totals,\n+        )\n+        proposal.markdown_ar_en = self._render_markdown(req, proposal)\n+        log.info(\n+            \"transformation_proposal_generated proposal_id=%s company=%s systems=%d\",\n+            proposal_id,\n+            req.company_name,\n+            len(line_items),\n+        )\n+        return proposal\n+\n+    # ── helpers ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n+\n+    def _guard_no_guarantee(self, req: TransformationProposalRequest) -> None:\n+        blob = \" \".join([req.notes, *req.pain_points]).lower()\n+        if any(tok in blob for tok in _FORBIDDEN_EN) or any(\n+            tok in (req.notes + \" \".join(req.pain_points)) for tok in _FORBIDDEN_AR\n+        ):\n+            raise TransformationProposalError(\n+                \"Guaranteed-outcome language is forbidden (no_guaranteed_sales_claims) — \"\n+                \"ممنوع وعود مبيعات مضمونة.\"\n+            )\n+\n+    @staticmethod\n+    def _proposal_id(req: TransformationProposalRequest) -> str:\n+        seed = f\"{req.company_name}{req.sector}{datetime.now(UTC).isoformat()}\"\n+        return \"txp_\" + hashlib.sha256(seed.encode()).hexdigest()[:16]\n+\n+    @staticmethod\n+    def _totals(items: list[ProposalLineItem]) -> dict[str, float]:\n+        setup_min = sum(i.setup_sar_min for i in items)\n+        # For the ceiling, fall back to the floor when a system has no max (custom).\n+        setup_max = sum(\n+            (i.setup_sar_max if i.setup_sar_max is not None else i.setup_sar_min) for i in items\n+        )\n+        monthly_min = sum((i.monthly_sar_min or 0.0) for i in items)\n+        monthly_max = sum(\n+            (i.monthly_sar_max if i.monthly_sar_max is not None else (i.monthly_sar_min or 0.0))\n+            for i in items\n+        )\n+        return {\n+            \"total_setup_sar_min\": float(setup_min),\n+            \"total_setup_sar_max\": float(setup_max),\n+            \"total_monthly_sar_min\": float(monthly_min),\n+            \"total_monthly_sar_max\": float(monthly_max),\n+        }\n+\n+    @staticmethod\n+    def _fmt_range(low: float | None, high: float | None) -> str:\n+        if not low and not high:\n+            return \"Custom / مخصص\"\n+        lo = f\"{int(low):,}\" if low else \"0\"\n+        if high is None or high == low:\n+            return f\"{lo} SAR\"\n+        return f\"{lo}–{int(high):,} SAR\"\n+\n+    def _render_markdown(\n+        self, req: TransformationProposalRequest, p: TransformationProposal\n+    ) -> str:\n+        now = p.generated_at.strftime(\"%Y-%m-%d\")\n+        lines: list[str] = [\n+            f\"# عرض التحول — {req.company_name}\",\n+            f\"**Dealix Transformation Proposal — {req.company_name}**\",\n+            \"\",\n+            f\"المعرف: `{p.proposal_id}` | التاريخ: {now} | الحالة: **يتطلب موافقة المؤسس**\",\n+            f\"ID: `{p.proposal_id}` | Date: {now} | Status: **approval_required**\",\n+            \"\",\n+            f\"القطاع / Sector: {req.sector}\",\n+        ]\n+        if req.stakeholders:\n+            lines.append(f\"أصحاب القرار / Stakeholders: {', '.join(req.stakeholders)}\")\n+        lines += [\n+            \"\",\n+            \"## ملخص تنفيذي / Executive Summary\",\n+            \"\",\n+            \"نصمّم نظام تشغيل أعمال AI-native يحوّل العمليات اليومية إلى workflows \"\n+            \"قابلة للقياس، مرتبطة بالمبيعات والتقارير والحوكمة وتجربة العميل.\",\n+            \"\",\n+            \"We design an AI-native business operating system that turns daily operations \"\n+            \"into measurable workflows wired to sales, reporting, governance, and CX.\",",
